title: AAIB Reports on Fatal Accident Involving SportStar SLM, G-CMGB

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Air Accidents Investigation Branch (AAIB) has released a report concerning a fatal accident involving the SportStar SLM, registration G-CMGB. The incident occurred on 1 September 2024, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire.

Investigators are currently looking into the circumstances surrounding the accident. This report highlights the importance of safety and investigation in aviation, reflecting the ongoing commitment to improving flight safety across the industry. Scotland's aviation heritage, with its rich history and commitment to connecting communities, underscores the significance of understanding such incidents to prevent future tragedies.
